hero.description: Over 30 years of passion for the perfect steak — steaks, grilled dishes and more in a family atmosphere.

about.heading: 30 Years of
about.body1: For over 30 years, El Nigo has stood for exceptional steaks, warm hospitality, and unforgettable evenings. What started as a small steakhouse has become a staple of the local gastronomy scene.
about.body2: Every detail — from selecting the finest cuts to our homemade sauces — reflects our dedication to true quality and family warmth. Restaurant Guru Recommendation 2024.

highlights.heading: Signature Dishes
highlights.subheading: Homemade with love — every dish an experience.
highlights.dish1Desc: Thinly sliced beef, Parmesan, cherry tomatoes, balsamic cream
highlights.dish2Desc: Beef steak, Cordon Bleu, chicken, lamb rack, sides — for 2 persons
highlights.dish3Desc: Garlic bread, alioli, turkey skewer, chorizo, mini mozzarella, meatballs — for 2 persons

menu.heading: Menu
menu.note: All prices incl. VAT and service. Allergens available on request.

reservation.heading: Reserve
reservation.body: Enjoy an unforgettable evening with us. We recommend booking in advance to secure your preferred table.
reservation.successText: We will be in touch shortly to confirm. For questions: +49 69 30066661.
reservation.errorText: Failed to send. Please try again or call us.

footer.description: Premium Steakhouse for unforgettable evenings — over 30 years of passion for the perfect steak.
